description:
Native English (American). Male, mid 60s. Studio quality.
Persona: weathered hen-keeper. Emotion: taciturn, dry, grounded.
A low gravelly rumble roughened by a smoker's chest, with a faint Central European shape on certain vowels; deliberate and sparing, short flat Michigan declaratives that never hurry and warm slowly.
text: Brown ones go to the board. The seconds go in the pot. [scoffs] Don't thank me... thank the hens. They keep the old hours. I just carry the basket. [deliberate] A good egg... you know it by the weight.
